causalAutopsy.notes: Three stacked defects lay latent on main (postmortem docs/postmortems/2026-07-01-silent-telegram-message-loss.md): (1) forwardToOwner encoded a sender-rejected NACK as a successful `forwarded`; (2) the deciding machine kept no rejection trace; (3) sender re-validation armed unconditionally against a users.json that a live-test/harness run had fixture-clobbered 19 days earlier. They only became a total silent-loss outage once the registry degenerated.
